query: Last question on the hyperspace physics test. If the matter and antimatter tanks on a Galaxy class starship are nine tenths depleted, calculate the intermix ratio necessary to reach a starbase a hundred light years away at warp factor eight. Begin.
response: Time elapsed. You now have one hour free before the next test.

query: Computer reads the ID number of Jake Kurland. Bridge to main Shuttlebay. Mister Kurland, this is Lieutenant Yar. Respond.
response: Evacuate immediately. Sixty five seconds to seal off.

query: Come on! I can't carry you both! You're not hurt.
(The dynamics relationships test is on the screens, and there are a lot of beeps going on)
Commander Remmick, report to Admiral Quinn.
